turns.content: When was the first moon landing?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.content: The first moon landing was on July 20, 1969. NASA's Apollo 11 mission successfully landed on the Moon with astronauts Neil Armstrong and Bu...

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.content: Neil Armstrong's famous words upon stepping onto the Moon were: "That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind." This is one of the most iconic quotes in human history.
